'''dazuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pvp|pvp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pvp|pvp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dazuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dæzizhith || dæzizhij || dæzizhish || dæzizhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dazuzuzhuth || dazuzuzhuj || dazuzuzhush || dazuzuzhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dazuzhuth || dazuzhuj || dazuzhush || dazuzhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dazufzhufth || dazufzhufj || dazufzhufsh || dazufzhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dazuzhuthu || dazuzhuju || dazuzhushu || dazuzhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || dazuzhuth || dazuzhuj || dazuzhush || dazuzhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dazuzhuthul || dazuzhujul || dazuzhushul || dazuzhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dazuzhuuthuthu || dazuzhuujuju || dazuzhuushushu || dazuzhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || dazuzhuthun || dazuzhujun || dazuzhushun || dazuzhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dazuzhuthuoro || dazuzhujuoro || dazuzhushuoro || dazuzhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
